situational_context: Running comeback accelerating: 4 runs completed in 16 days (since 2026-05-03). Run #4 (May 18): 5.01 km, 43 min, HR avg 140 — aggressive distance jump (+43% vs Run #3's 3.53 km) but HR well in Z2. Training status upgraded to Maintaining (from Detraining). ACWR 0.87 — safely within [0.8, 1.3] band. Acute load ramp +13.1% week-over-week (slightly above 10% cap). Chronic load 21.94, drifting down as old cycling volume rolls off. VO2max running 38.7 (+0.4). Sleep declining: 7d avg 6.73h (was 7.23h), HRV weekly avg 37 (was 40) — recovery capacity being stretched by added running impact. Weight downtrend continues: 103.8 kg (-0.45 kg/week). E-bike commuting remains baseline activity on sur site days (~38 km/day, suffer ~16). Return-to-running protocol active — Run #5 consolidation at ≤5 km scheduled Fri May 23 (5 days post Run #4). Tissue tolerance remains the limiting factor at 103.8 kg. No new labs since Dec 2025. Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026.

recommendations.text: CONSOLIDATE Run #4 distance: Run #5 (May 23) must stay at ≤5 km. The +43% jump from Run #3 exceeded the 10% protocol cap. At 103.8 kg, tissue adaptation (Achilles, patellar tendon, tibia) is the bottleneck, not cardio. If any post-Run #4 pain lasting >24h, skip Run #5 entirely.
recommendations.measurable: Run #5 completed at ≤5.0 km with no post-run pain lasting >24h, or appropriately skipped if pain present

recommendations.text: Address sleep decline: 7d avg dropped 7.23h to 6.73h (-30 min/night). Sleep is the primary recovery enabler during a running comeback at this body weight. Target ≥7h nightly — audit evening routine and baby wake patterns.
Continue eccentric calf raises 3x/week and daily Vitamin D supplementation. Non-negotiable injury-prevention measures at 103.8 kg with insufficient Vitamin D (27 ng/mL Dec 2025).
recommendations.measurable: ≥3 calf-raise sessions and daily Vitamin D supplementation this week

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized pain (Achilles, patellar, tibia, plantar) lasting >24h post Run #4 or Run #5
markers_to_watch.reason: The +43% distance jump in Run #4 is the highest tissue-loading event since comeback began — pain signal window is 24-72h post-run

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if 7d avg drops below 6.5h or 3+ nights below 6h in a week
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 6.73h and declining — approaching threshold where recovery capacity is meaningfully compromised

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if drops below 34 (>10% below 4-week baseline of ~39)
markers_to_watch.reason: Weekly avg at 37, trending down. Combined with sleep decline could signal early overreaching

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if rises >5 bpm above 50 bpm baseline for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 50 bpm (+1 from previous), stable but tracking
